title: DataQualityCheckImpact
description: Data Quality Check Impact model for ranking checks by business criticality.

testCaseId.description: Unique identifier of the test case.

testCaseFullyQualifiedName.description: Fully qualified name of the test case.

testSuiteId.description: Unique identifier of the test suite.

testSuiteFullyQualifiedName.description: Fully qualified name of the test suite.

entityFullyQualifiedName.description: The data entity this test case is testing.

entityType.description: The type of entity being tested.

impactScore.description: Calculated impact score (0-100) based on downstream usage, consumers, and incidents.

downstreamUsage.description: Number of downstream entities using this data.

consumerCount.description: Number of direct consumers of this data.

recentIncidents.description: Number of failed test results in the last 30 days.

lastFailedAt.description: Timestamp of the most recent test failure.

testCaseStatus.description: Current status of the test case.
